SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

createTokenLocker(address,uint256,uint40.details: Two ways to pay the creation fee: send `ethFee()` wei with the call to lock 100% of `amount_`, or send 0 wei and have `tokenFeeBps()` deducted from `amount_` in the locked token itself.

notifyLockerOwnerChange(uint40,address,a.details: Called by a `TitanLockerV1` whenever its ownership changes, so the search index above stays accurate.

setCreationEnabled(bool).details: Turns off new locks so users can be migrated to a future version. Existing locks can still be extended/deposited/withdrawn as normal.

transferOwnership(address).details: Reverts on a zero-address target so ownership can never be bricked by accident; there is deliberately no "renounce ownership" escape hatch.

_tokenLockersForAddress.details: Lets the frontend search lockers by creator, locked token, locker address, or (for LP tokens) either underlying paired token.

userdoc.notice: Deploys and indexes `TitanLockerV1` instances. Charges a creation fee that the caller may pay either in ETH (locking 100% of the deposit) or by letting a percentage of the deposited token itself be taken as the fee.
